description_long: This object is a vintage rectangular medicine box labeled 'FROG IN YOUR THROAT?' on the front, featuring an illustration of a green frog and detailed product information. The box is made of a light-colored, possibly cardboard material, with visible wear and aged patina. The front panel displays the product name, a price of 10 cents, and the manufacturer's name, 'FROG IN YOUR THROAT COMPANY.' The back of the box is densely printed with usage instructions and claims about the remedy's effectiveness for coughs, hoarseness, and throat irritation. The side views reveal the box's thickness and construction, with one side partially open to show two brown, round tablets or lozenges inside. The overall appearance is that of an early 20th-century medicinal product, likely intended for relief of throat discomfort.
description: A vintage rectangular cardboard medicine box labeled 'FROG IN YOUR THROAT?' with a green frog illustration and two brown lozenges visible inside. The box features detailed printed instructions and product claims on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main label with 'FROG IN YOUR THROAT?', a green frog illustration, and two brown lozenges partially visible inside the open end.
description_view_1: The side view displays the box's narrow profile and the open end, revealing the thickness of the cardboard and the edge of the lozenges.
description_view_2: The back view is covered with dense printed text describing the product's uses, instructions, and claims, with no illustration visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows a plain, unmarked surface of the box, highlighting its rectangular shape and construction.
attribute_label_text: FROG IN YOUR THROAT? The Greatest Cough and Voice Lozenge on Earth 10c FROG IN YOUR THROAT COMPANY ... AN INNOCENT INSTANTANEOUS REMEDY These tablets are useful in Coughs, Colds, Hoarseness, 'LARYNGAL' and Bronchial Inflammations, Rawness, Irritation, Tickling, 'CHORSE MESS' in the Throat, 'SMOKER'S SORE THROAT.' Especially useful to Singers, Speakers, Readers, Actors, and all voice workers. They afford greater relief than anything heretofore known. Let a tablet dissolve slowly before retiring, and children will rest quietly. Harmless. Does not upset the stomach. [illegible]
